subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Divine Lote-Tree! The tongue of utterance maketh mention of thee, and hath bestowed upon thee from the ocean of exposition that which the treasures of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه سدره ترا ذکر مینماید و از بحر بیان عنایت فرموده آنچه را که کنوز عالم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
